inline_comments: Send a typing indicator. First tries the live turn context (cheapest path).  When the context has been revoked (debounced messages) we fall back to proactive messaging via the stored conversation reference so the user still sees the "…" bubble.
Enable default retry/backoff for throttling/transient failures.
